sourceMovie.title: Major Payne
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Major Payne works as a adventure movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The adventure and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Deadpool
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Major Payne clicked for you, Deadpool (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Major Payne?
faq.answer: Try Deadpool, Johnny English Strikes Again, Cadet Kelly—each shares DNA with Major Payne while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Major Payne?
faq.answer: Major Payne (1995) is best described as Adventure, Comedy, Family. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Major Payne worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this adventure lane.
